news_items.title: Germany XI vs Paraguay: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for World Cup 2026 | The Standard
news_items.author: Ronan Sullivan
news_items.text:
Germany XI vs Paraguay: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for World Cup 2026 | The Standard

Sport| Football

# Germany XI vs Paraguay: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for World Cup 2026

Four-time tournament winners are strong favourites for last-32 clash in Boston

Ronan Sullivan

2 minutes ago

COMMENTS

Germany take on Paraguay in the round of 32 as they look to win their first World Cup knockout game since they last became champions in 2014.

After failing to make it past the group stage both in Qatar in 2022 and Russia in 2018, Germany thrashed debutants Curacao 7-1 and came from behind to defeat Ivory Coast 2-1 to top Group E, despite a 2-1 reverse to Ecuador in the final game.

If they beat Gustavo Alfaro’s men in Boston on Monday, they are likely in line to meet 2018 champions France in a last-16 blockbuster on July 4 in Philadelphia. Didier Deschamps’ side face Sweden on Tuesday.

But before that, head coach Julian Nagelsmann must decide who to start for Germany against Paraguay as they go in search of a fifth World Cup triumph.

His most difficult decision will be whether to stick with Arsenal’s Kai Havertz up front.

Former

news_items.title: Germany vs Paraguay Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire
news_items.text:
Germany vs Paraguay Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire

# Germany vs Paraguay Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

Germany vs Paraguay Round of 32 preview: predicted lineups, injury news, head-to-head, odds and our score prediction for Monday's 2026 World Cup clash.

Updated on June 29, 2026 3:16AM EST

Share

By:

Pierre Courtin

Adam Zdroik

Updated on June 29, 2026 3:16AM EST

World Cup

Subscribe Log In

From the latest news to creating the best starting lineup, we've got you covered - Sign-up today

# Germany vs Paraguay Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

The knockouts are here, and Germany are the heavy favorite against a Paraguay side built to make them uncomfortable. Germany won Group E playing some of the most expansive football in the tournament, and they arrive as one of the contenders. Paraguay scraped through in third in their group on four points by doing the opposite: sitting deep, staying compact and daring opponents to break them down.

This is the matchup the bracket loves. Ger

news_items.title: Germany vs. Paraguay preview: Team news and predicted lineups – World Cup 2026
news_items.text:
Germany vs. Paraguay preview: Team news and predicted lineups – World Cup 2026

FCB B04 SGE BVB SCF M05 RBL SVW VFB BMG WOL FCA FCU FCSP TSG FCH KOE HSV

Here is our preview of Germany's match against Paraguay in the round of 32 of the World Cup.

| Photo by Alex Grimm/Getty Images |
| --- |

Germany's 11-match winning streak came to a disappointing end as they surrendered a one-goal lead to suffer a 2-1 defeat in their final Group E fixture against Ecuador.

However, the result mattered little, as victories over Curacao (7-1) and Ivory Coast (2-1) had already secured top spot and a place in the knockout stage.

Julian Nagelsmann's side will now look to bounce back and book their place in the last 16 when they face Paraguay in the round of 32 on Monday at 22:30 CEST at the Gillette Stadium in Foxborough.

"Before the tournament, we would have been delighted to qualify for the next round as group winners after only two games," Germany director of professional football Rudi Völler said at Saturday's press conference, reflecting on the team's performances so far.

"We deserved to achieve exactly that and were obviously very pleased. At the same time, we know how to put winning the gro

{"title": "Germany XI vs Paraguay: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for World Cup 2026 | The Standard", "url": "https://www.standard.co.uk/sport/football/germany-xi-vs-paraguay-confirmed-team-news-predicted-lineup-injury-latest-world-cup-2026-b1287923.html", "publishedDate": "2026-06-28T17:52:11.000Z", "author": "Ronan Sullivan", "text": "Germany XI vs Paraguay: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for World Cup 2026 | The Standard

Sport| Football

# Germany XI vs Paraguay: Confirmed team news, predicted lineup and injury latest for World Cup 2026

Four-time tournament winners are strong favourites for last-32 clash in Boston

Ronan Sullivan

2 minutes ago

COMMENTS

Germany take on Paraguay in the round of 32 as they look to win their first World Cup knockout game since they last became champions in 2014.

After failing to make it past the group stage both in Qatar in 2022 and Russia in 2018, Germany thrashed debutants Curacao 7-1 and came from behind to defeat Ivory Coast 2-1 to top Group E, despite a 2-1 reverse to Ecuador in the final game.

If they beat Gustavo Alfaro’s men in Boston on Monday, they are likely in line to meet 2018 champions France in a last-16 blockbuster on July 4 in Philadelphia. Didier Deschamps’ side face Sweden on Tuesday.

But before that, head coach Julian Nagelsmann must decide who to start for Germany against Paraguay as they go in search of a fifth World Cup triumph.

His most difficult decision will be whether to stick with Arsenal’s Kai Havertz up front.

# Germany vs Paraguay Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Round of 32

The knockouts are here, and Germany are the heavy favorite against a Paraguay side built to make them uncomfortable. Germany won Group E playing some of the most expansive football in the tournament, and they arrive as one of the contenders. Paraguay scraped through in third in their group on four points by doing the opposite: sitting deep, staying compact and daring opponents to break them down.

This is the matchup the bracket loves. Ger"}
{"title": "Germany vs. Paraguay preview: Team news and predicted lineups – World Cup 2026", "url": "https://bulinews.com/germany-paraguay-preview-team-news-and-predicted-lineups", "publishedDate": "2026-06-27T22:49:41.000Z", "author": null, "text": "Germany vs. Paraguay preview: Team news and predicted lineups – World Cup 2026

FCB B04 SGE BVB SCF M05 RBL SVW VFB BMG WOL FCA FCU FCSP TSG FCH KOE HSV

Here is our preview of Germany's match against Paraguay in the round of 32 of the World Cup.

| Photo by Alex Grimm/Getty Images |
| --- |

Germany's 11-match winning streak came to a disappointing end as they surrendered a one-goal lead to suffer a 2-1 defeat in their final Group E fixture against Ecuador.

However, the result mattered little, as victories over Curacao (7-1) and Ivory Coast (2-1) had already secured top spot and a place in the knockout stage.

Julian Nagelsmann's side will now look to bounce back and book their place in the last 16 when they face Paraguay in the round of 32 on Monday at 22:30 CEST at the Gillette Stadium in Foxborough.

"Before the tournament, we would have been delighted to qualify for the next round as group winners after only two games," Germany director of professional football Rudi Völler said at Saturday's press conference, reflecting on the team's performances so far.

"We deserved to achieve exactly that and were obviously very pleased. At the same time, we know how to put winning the gro"}
